## Tags
spreadsheet, grid, cut, break, divide, separate, segment

## Categories
text, files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/table-columns-split)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TableColumnsSplit;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TableColumnsSplit { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
